title: Brahmapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Brahmapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirumayanam Brahmapureeswarar Temple( திருமயானம் பிரம்மபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Tirumayanam in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirumayanam Brahmapureeswarar Temple( திருமயானம் பிரம்மபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Tirumayanam in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Brahmmapureeswarar. His consort is known as Malarkuzhal Minnammai.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Aiyaru River
topPlaces.description: Aiyaru is a river flowing in the Namakkal district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Appananallur
topPlaces.description: Appananallur is a village in Thottiyam Taluk in the Tiruchirappalli district of the Tamil Nadu State in India. The village is inhabited by 1482 families, with a population of 5610, with 2792 males and 2818 females per the 2011 Census of India.

topPlaces.name: Manamedu Trichy
topPlaces.description: Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.

topPlaces.name: Thiruthalaiyur
topPlaces.description: Thiruthalaiyur is a village panchayat located in the Tiruchirappalli district of Tamil Nadu state, India. Malaikuravan community reside in the village.

items.note: Aiyaru is a river flowing in the Namakkal district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Appananallur is a village in Thottiyam Taluk in the Tiruchirappalli district of the Tamil Nadu State in India. The village is inhabited by 1482 families, with a population of 5610, with 2792 males and 2818 females per the 2011 Census of India.

Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.
Thiruthalaiyur is a village panchayat located in the Tiruchirappalli district of Tamil Nadu state, India. Malaikuravan community reside in the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Brahmapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Brahmapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Brahmapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Aiyaru River, Appananallur, Manamedu Trichy, Thiruthalaiyur.
